extra.reason: Decided: parody brewery names, localStorage leaderboard behind a LeaderboardStore interface (backend swappable later), keyboard-only controls for MVP. Recorded in docs/GAME_DESIGN.md

Vite+TS+Phaser scaffold complete: Boot/Menu/Game/Results scenes, placeholder ride, LeaderboardStore over localStorage, strict tsc build passing, full loop verified in browser. Build docs added to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

Implemented and verified in browser: diagonal-scroll riding with steering/speed, road-edge and cone collisions, crash/lives/finish states; BuzzSystem with staged drift, input lag, wobble, mirrored inputs, sway, vignette, mushy response. Dev keys B/N feed Buzz until beercycle-az9 lands.

Implemented and verified in browser: diagonal-scroll riding with steering/speed, road-edge and cone collisions, crash/lives/finish states; BuzzSystem with staged drift, input lag, wobble, mirrored inputs, sway, vignette, mushy response. Dev keys B/N feed Buzz until beercycle-az9 lands.

Trigger zones, chug timing minigame with accuracy scoring and PERFECT POUR bonus, streak multiplier, escalating Buzz per beer, repeat rounds with faster marker, exit back to riding. Verified in browser: both stops triggered, +88 (x1) and +160/+230 (x2 streak) scored, Buzz meter filled.
HUD was done with core riding; menu existed; added P pause overlay and the Boulder Bugle newspaper results screen with outcome headlines and highlighted high-score list. Verified in browser.

Peds/dogs/geese/car doors with collisions and near-miss style points; water/taco/tube/happy-hour/kombucha pickups with popups; BUI cop with suspicion meter and citation ending + Bugle headline. Verified in browser: dog collision crash, pickup effects, busted headline. Balance tuning left for playtesting.

Programmatic pixel-art pipeline: full sprite set from pixel maps + canvas-drawn sky/Flatirons/clouds/brewery facade, pedal animation, parallax, menu art. Texture keys swappable for Aseprite PNGs later. Verified in browser.
Runtime WebAudio chiptune: bass+lead loop, full SFX set, Buzz-linked detune warble, mute toggle, autoplay-safe lazy init. Verified context running and sequencer scheduling in browser.

Repo made public per user; GitHub Pages enabled with workflow source; Actions workflow builds Vite and deploys dist/ on push to main. Live and verified at https://guifreelife.com/beercycle/ (account-level custom domain applies to project pages).

Route data format + loader with 3 routes (Pearl St, The Hill, East Boulder), per-route palettes/hazards/breweries, carried run state, interim vs final results pages. Flatirons backdrop was done in beercycle-5rl. Verified route chain in browser. Flagstaff bonus stage filed as follow-up.

All four shipped in commit 2d22159: 24x24 code-drawn portraits x8 states per rider, menu character select + polaroid trio splash, reactive Doom-style HUD portrait with Buzz rocking, per-avatar bike sprite variants incl. helmetless HOSKINS. Verified select cycling, portrait state transitions (hammered->sober, sweat), and variant textures in browser.

Epic complete: names DWNWRD/HOSKINS/DRELLIS locked, all child tasks shipped and verified. Reminder to user: confirm the friends are OK with likenesses in the public game before sharing wide.
